ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vertices" (
  "vertex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vertex */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence (e.g., gene name) */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., coding, non-coding) */,
  "sequence_description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vertex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene the exon belongs to */,
  "exon_number" INTEGER /* Order number of the exon in the gene */,
  "exon_length" INTEGER /* Length of the exon */,
  "exon_type" TEXT /* Type of exon (e.g., coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "introns" (
  "intron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intron */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene the intron belongs to */,
  "intron_number" INTEGER /* Order number of the intron in the gene */,
  "intron_length" INTEGER /* Length of the intron */,
  "intron_type" TEXT /* Type of intron (e.g., small nuclear RNA, microRNA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_introns_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strands" (
  "strand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strand */,
  "strand_name" TEXT /* Name of the strand (e.g., +, -) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strand */,
  "strand_type" TEXT /* Type of strand (e.g., sense, antisense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the metadata */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference (e.g., PubMed ID) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., team member, principal investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
